allow: Bash(bd update dota-analysis-xus --description "OpenDota does not expose player positions \(1-5\) directly — only lane_role \(1-4, the lane played\) and is_roaming. Stratz provides a direct \\`position\\` field \(POSITION_1 through POSITION_5\) via its GraphQL API.:*)

Bash(python -c "from dota_coach.enricher import get_core_items, build_dynamic_core_items, _get_item_timings_cached; from dota_coach.models import EnrichmentContext; from dota_coach.detector import HERO_ITEM_PATHS; print\(''imports OK''\); print\(''HERO_ITEM_PATHS heroes:'', list\(HERO_ITEM_PATHS.keys\(\)\)\)")

Bash(python -c "from dota_coach.models import ItemBootstrapEntry, EnrichmentContext; e = EnrichmentContext\(patch_name=''7.38'', benchmarks=[], item_costs={}, hero_base_stats={}\); print\(e.hero_item_bootstrap, e.build_note\)")
Bash(python -c "from dota_coach.extractor import RADIANT_T1_MID, _classify_death; print\(''OK'', RADIANT_T1_MID\)")
Bash(python -m pytest tests/test_death_classifier.py tests/test_detector.py tests/test_prompt.py tests/test_extractor.py -v)

Bash(curl -s -X POST "https://api.stratz.com/graphql" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{""query"": ""{ heroStats { synergy\(heroId: 1, bracketBasicIds: [LEGEND_ANCIENT]\) { heroId2 winsWithHeroId2 matchCountWith } } }""}")

Bash(python -c "from dota_coach.models import MatchMetrics; import json; m = MatchMetrics\(match_id=1, hero=''Pudge'', duration_minutes=30.5, result=''win'', lh_at_10=45, denies_at_10=2, deaths_before_10=0, death_timestamps_laning=[], net_worth_at_10=2000, net_worth_at_20=4500, opponent_net_worth_at_10=1800, opponent_net_worth_at_20=4200, gpm=400, xpm=500, laning_heatmap_own_half_pct=0.65, ward_purchases=3, first_roshan_minute=None, first_tower_minute=None\); print\(''MatchMetrics instantiated successfully''\); print\(''lane_enemies:'', m.lane_enemies\); print\(''lane_allies:'', m.lane_allies\); print\(''Model schema keys with lane:'', [k for k in m.model_fields.keys\(\) if ''lane'' in k]\)")

Bash(python -c "from dota_coach.models import MatchMetrics; fields = MatchMetrics.model_fields; lane_fields = {k: v for k, v in fields.items\(\) if ''lane'' in k}; print\(''Lane-related fields:''\); import json; print\(json.dumps\({k: {''type'': str\(v.annotation\), ''default'': str\(v.default\)} for k, v in lane_fields.items\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python -c "from dota_coach.models import MatchMetrics; m = MatchMetrics\(match_id=1, hero='Anti-Mage', duration_minutes=30, result='win', lh_at_10=50, denies_at_10=0, deaths_before_10=0, death_timestamps_laning=[], net_worth_at_10=1000, net_worth_at_20=2000, opponent_net_worth_at_10=900, opponent_net_worth_at_20=1800, gpm=400, xpm=350, laning_heatmap_own_half_pct=0.8, ward_purchases=2\); print\('lane_hero_icons field exists:', hasattr\(m, 'lane_hero_icons'\)\); print\('lane_hero_icons value:', m.lane_hero_icons\); print\('lane_hero_icons type:', type\(m.lane_hero_icons\)\)")

Bash(python -c "from dota_coach.models import MatchMetrics; m = MatchMetrics\(match_id=1, hero='Anti-Mage', duration_minutes=30, result='win', lh_at_10=50, denies_at_10=0, deaths_before_10=0, death_timestamps_laning=[], net_worth_at_10=1000, net_worth_at_20=2000, opponent_net_worth_at_10=900, opponent_net_worth_at_20=1800, gpm=400, xpm=350, total_last_hits=200, first_core_item_minute=15.5, first_core_item_name='Battle Fury', laning_heatmap_own_half_pct=0.8, ward_purchases=2, teamfight_participation_rate=0.75, teamfight_avg_damage_contribution=1500, first_roshan_minute=20.0, first_tower_minute=25.0\); print\('lane_hero_icons field exists:', hasattr\(m, 'lane_hero_icons'\)\); print\('lane_hero_icons value:', m.lane_hero_icons\); print\('lane_hero_icons type:', type\(m.lane_hero_icons\)\)")
